problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
